description: This is a clean, decrypted static JSON API database for CricFy TV, generated automatically every 5 minutes via GitHub Actions.

startup_config.description: Global app configuration, popups, and API redirection URLs.

fields.api_url: Decrypted pages base URL for fallback operations
fields.api2: Decrypted pages base URL for fallback operations
fields.channels_api_base: Base directory URL for dynamic category channels
fields.message: Global announcement/notice text displayed in the app
fields.update_url: App update or landing page URL

categories_menu.description: Main category menu list. Contains the category names, logos, types, and table_names.

fields.cat: Raw or parsed JSON metadata containing name, logo, type, and source endpoint
fields.table_name: Dynamic category table name (used to fetch the category's channel list from /channels/{table_name}.json)

categories_menu.usage_flow: Step 1: Fetch categories.json to render the main menu. For each item: if 'table_name' is present, fetch the category channels list from 'base_url + /channels/{table_name}.json', or load individual parsed category metadata from '/categories/{id}.json'.

sports_tv_channels.description: Global list of standard TV channels with raw stringified and nested attributes.

fields.channel: Stringified TV channel details (name, logo, visible, links_path)
fields.links: Stringified JSON array containing playback servers and links

sports_tv_channels.usage_flow: To play a TV channel: Fetch its clean, fully parsed direct streaming links using '/channels/{id}.json' (e.g. '/channels/2.json').

live_events.description: List of active live and upcoming sports matches and events.

fields.event: Stringified event details including eventDetails, teamA, teamB details, visible, date, and time
fields.links: Stringified JSON array containing active playback streams and DRM keys for the event

live_events.usage_flow: To play a live event: Fetch its clean, fully parsed direct streaming links and match info using '/events/{id}.json' (e.g. '/events/35.json').

tournament_logos.description: Filter categories/tournament logo mappings for live events (e.g. Boxing, Cricket, Football).

fields.TournamentName: Tournament category name associated with a logo URL string

individual_category_details.description: Contains clean, parsed metadata for any specific category.

fields.cat: Object containing name, logo, visible, type, and source API endpoint

category_channels.description: Contains list of channels inside a specific custom category (e.g. `/channels/SW5kaWExNzY5NjIyNDI1NzM5.json`).

fields.name: Channel display name
fields.links: Array of stream objects containing name, playback link, and DRM decryption keys

decrypted_channel_links.description: Contains clean decrypted playback streams, name, logo, and DRM decryption keys for any specific TV Channel ID.

fields.name: Channel display name
fields.is_playlist: Boolean flag if channel is an M3U playlist
fields.links: Array of stream objects containing name, link, scheme, and api (DRM Key)

decrypted_event_links.description: Contains clean decrypted playback streams, tournament details, teams information, and DRM keys for any specific Live Event ID.

fields.eventDetails: Object containing category, eventName, and eventLogo
fields.teamA: Object containing name and logo for Team A
fields.teamB: Object containing name and logo for Team B
fields.links: Array of stream objects containing server name, playback link, scheme, and api (DRM Key)

decrypted_event_links.player_decryption_handling: If 'api' is present in stream links (e.g. 'daa8ea92...:4042e04...'), it represents a DRM protected stream. Split the 'api' string by ':' to get the Key ID (left) and Key (right), and pass them to your player's DRM ClearKey configuration.
